patient_summary:
• 73/Female patient
• Primary Dx: Mixed dyslipidemia, Hyperlipidemia assoc w/ T2DM, Hypertension
• Key Procedures: Colonoscopy with biopsy
• Active Meds: 1 medications including Atorvastatin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Iron 41 (L); eGFR 58 (L); Ferritin 266.8 (H); Triglycerides 158 (H)
• Key History: Hx type 2 diabetes mellitus
